fields.description: Grouping header for renders (wizard, print, portal) — copied from the template section.
fields.label: Section Title

fields.description: Standard values: Pass / Fail / Replace / Other (Fail and Replace can raise a Warranty Claim). Data, not Select, so templates can define custom choices per question (the row's hidden Options) — the wizard renders whichever set applies as buttons.
fields.label: Selection

fields.description: Custom choices from the template section item, one per line. Blank = the standard Pass/Fail/Replace/Other. The wizard renders these as the row's buttons; the desk grid keeps the standard Select.
fields.label: Options

fields.description: Submit is blocked while this row is unanswered. Copied from the template section item.
fields.label: Is Mandatory

fields.description: Photo of the check (e.g. a failed part).
fields.label: Photo
